title: [Nyessem, Portal Checkpoint]
description: Violet-hued banners line one wall, over an arrangement of plush violet and silver-hued pillows arrayed for comfort.  Across the entire opposite wall, a cascading white stone fountain carved into the wall displays dozens of water-filled tiers pouring down to a polished gem-inlaid basin.  Next to a tall sapphire-lined tunnel, a stout stone kiosk set with a wide sign has been built as a checkpoint.  Above both, a bright violet cloth pennant stitched with onyx threads is prominently displayed.
